source_pr.title: *: support history read with old schema
source_pr.body: When user set 'tidb_snapshot' variable, load and use the schema at the snapshot time.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from history_read order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 <nil>", "4 <nil>", "8 8", "9 9")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from history_read order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 <nil>", "4 <nil>", "8 8", "9 9")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from history_read order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("2 <nil>", "4 <nil>", "8 8", "9 9")) (executor/executor_test.go)
files: domain/domain.go, executor/compiler.go, executor/executor_simple.go, executor/executor_test.go, infoschema/infoschema.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go
